overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character in a purple scarf exploring various interconnected rooms and corridors within a gothic castle, including a common room, classroom, grand hallway, bathroom, and tapestry-lined corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with stone fireplace and bookshelves

events.description: character approaches and opens wooden door to exit the room

agents.ego_description: walking through a cozy gothic room with a large stone fireplace, examining the surroundings before heading toward the exit door

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with decorative mantel and crest
upholstered leather chair near the fireplace
tall dark wood shelves filled with books
tall pointed arch window with stone tracery
dark wood framed chalkboard with writing

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy gothic common room featuring a large stone fireplace, leather armchairs, and wooden bookshelves. Natural light filters through arched windows as the character walks toward a wooden door at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: large classroom hall with wooden tables and arched windows

events.description: character opens door and enters a spacious hall filled with wooden tables
character approaches another door at the far end of the hall

agents.ego_description: opening a wooden door and walking through a spacious classroom hall with wooden tables, cabinets, and magical artifacts displayed on walls

entered.detail: long wooden tables arranged in rows for study
tall arched windows letting in bright natural light
dark wood storage cabinets with glass doors
skeletal remains of a creature mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large hall with wooden plank flooring and rows of study tables. The room features tall gothic windows, wooden cabinets, and an animal skeleton mounted on the wall. The character walks toward a distant stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand corridor with stone pillars and bright windows

events.description: character opens door and enters a grand corridor with tall stone pillars
character approaches an ornate carved wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking through a sunlit corridor lined with tall stone pillars and large arched windows, approaching an ornate door

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone columns supporting the ceiling
heavy wooden door with intricate circular carvings
stone railing overlooking a lower level

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand corridor with polished stone floors and towering pillars. Bright light streams through large windows as the character approaches an ornately carved wooden door at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic bathroom with green stalls and white sinks

events.description: character opens carved door and enters a bathroom with green wooden stalls
character approaches the exit door of the bathroom

agents.ego_description: walking through a bathroom with green wooden stalls, white ceramic sinks, and wall mirrors, heading toward the far exit

entered.detail: green painted wooden bathroom stalls with lattice tops
row of white porcelain sinks mounted on the wall
rectangular mirrors with wooden frames above the sinks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bathroom with white tiled walls, green wooden stalls, and a row of white ceramic sinks. The room has a high vaulted ceiling with windows at the far end. The character walks past the fixtures toward another carved door.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor lined with medieval tapestries

events.description: character exits bathroom and enters a corridor lined with medieval tapestries

agents.ego_description: walking down a long corridor adorned with large medieval tapestries, passing another student standing near the wall

notable_agents.action: student standing still facing the tapestry wall

entered.detail: large woven wall hangings depicting figures and scenes
upholstered benches along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bathroom into a long corridor with patterned carpet and walls covered in medieval tapestries. Green velvet benches line the right side. Another student stands in the distance near large windows at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a gothic castle, transitioning from a cozy, intimate living space into a series of increasingly grand and formal institutional halls. It begins in a warm common room filled with leather armchairs and bookshelves, moving toward a wooden door that opens into a spacious study hall characterized by wooden plank flooring and an animal skeleton mounted on the wall. As the character passes through a distant stone archway, the environment shifts into a grand corridor of polished stone and towering pillars bathed in bright light before leading toward an ornately carved door. The scene then moves into a starkly different bathroom with white tiled walls and green wooden stalls, which the camera traverses toward another exit. Finally, the shot emerges into a long, opulent corridor featuring patterned carpets and medieval tapestries, where green velvet benches line the path toward a distant student standing by large windows.
